instruction: In Numbers, set cell {CELL} of the active sheet's first table to the value {VALUE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads the cell value back via AppleScript; the baseline writes a different value so the no-op scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Numbers" to activate' -e 'tell application "Numbers" to if (count of documents) = 0 then make new document' -e 'tell application "Numbers" to tell front document to tell active sheet to tell table 1 to set value of cell "{CELL}" to {BASELINE}' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Numbers" to tell front document to tell active sheet to tell table 1 to set value of cell "{CELL}" to {VALUE}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Numbers" to tell front document to tell active sheet to tell table 1 to get value of cell "{CELL}" as string
